allow: PowerShell(Write-Output "=== node processes ==="; $procs = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='node.exe'"; if \($procs\) { $procs | Select-Object ProcessId, @{n='Cmd';e={$_.CommandLine}} | Format-List } else { Write-Output "\(none\)" }; Write-Output "=== listening dev ports ==="; $ports = Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -in 9021,5180,5173,4173,3000 }; if \($ports\) { $ports | Select-Object LocalPort, OwningProcess | Sort-Object LocalPort -Unique | Format-Table -AutoSize } else { Write-Output "\(none\)" })

PowerShell(Stop-Process -Id 19776,14544 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; $still = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='node.exe'"; if \($still\) { Write-Output "REMAINING node processes:"; $still | Select-Object ProcessId, @{n='Cmd';e={$_.CommandLine}} | Format-List } else { Write-Output "All node.exe processes stopped." }; $p = Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -in 9021,5180,5173,4173,3000 }; if \($p\) { Write-Output "Ports still listening:"; $p | Select-Object LocalPort, OwningProcess | Format-Table -AutoSize } else { Write-Output "All dev ports free." })
